query:
SELECT 
  q.id as qr_id, 
  q.status, 
  q.access_type, 
  q.property_id,
  q.room_id,
  p.name as property_name,
  r.room_number
FROM peppr_qr_codes q
JOIN peppr_properties p ON p.id = q.property_id
JOIN peppr_rooms r ON r.id = q.room_id
WHERE q.status = 'active'
ORDER BY q.access_type, p.name
LIMIT 6;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2C19S8bbifd7Eo1.072c8bfadc68 --database jKkhr27mS3Co8cU4bKqLWb --execute 
SELECT 
  q.id as qr_id, 
  q.status, 
  q.access_type, 
  q.property_id,
  q.room_id,
  p.name as property_name,
  r.room_number
FROM peppr_qr_codes q
JOIN peppr_properties p ON p.id = q.property_id
JOIN peppr_rooms r ON r.id = q.room_id
WHERE q.status = 'active'
ORDER BY q.access_type, p.name
LIMIT 6;
